root_text.an5.254:1.5: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, pañcannaṁ macchariyānaṁ etaṁ paṭikuṭṭhaṁ, yadidaṁ dhammamacchariyan”ti.

translation_text.an5.254:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these five kinds of stinginess.
translation_text.an5.254:1.3: Stinginess with dwellings, families, material things, praise, and the teachings.
translation_text.an5.254:1.4: These are the five kinds of stinginess.
translation_text.an5.254:1.5: The most contemptible of these five kinds of stinginess is stinginess with the teaching.”

variant_text.an5.254:1.5: paṭikuṭṭhaṁ → patikiṭṭhaṁ (bj, pts1ed); patikkiṭṭhaṁ (sya-all, km); paṭikiṭṭhaṁ (mr)
